frames.setting: Exterior of Museum of the Moving Image in Astoria, Queens; wide shot of building facade and signage; interior shots of a minimalist white institutional space with chairs and tables; bus in parking lot
visual_elements: Museum of the Moving Image exterior sign
Kaufman Studios building visible in background
Candidate seated at a wooden table
Various community members/visitors in museum space
frames.presentation_style: Observational documentary; location-establishing shots followed by interview and listening session footage; minimal graphic treatment

frames.setting: Office or civic meeting room with large windows and natural light; plants visible; candidate seated at a table in a suit listening and on phone
visual_elements: Candidate in dark suit and tie at a desk
Multiple angles of the same scene
Candidate rubbing face / listening intently on phone
frames.presentation_style: Narrative documentary with close observation of the candidate; no text overlays; intimate coverage of working interactions

frames.setting: Candidate at a desk reviewing papers in daylight office; final frames use a dark background with bold gold and white text graphics
visual_elements: Candidate in suit reading documents at desk
Bold gold serif font on black background for closing card
Campaign branding: 'A NEW ERA for NEW YORK CITY' in red, white, and blue
Dramatic lighting contrast between subject and dark background
Candidate smiling directly at camera in one frame
frames.presentation_style: Documentary footage transitioning to a polished campaign outro card; 'WE'LL SEE YOU TOMORROW.' functions as a recurring sign-off brand element; strong typographic closing treatment

summary.dominant_setting: Museum of the Moving Image (Astoria, Queens) and office/meeting room with large windows
text_overlay_types: Campaign sign-off card ('WE'LL SEE YOU TOMORROW.')
Campaign slogan card ('A NEW ERA for NEW YORK CITY')
visual_themes: Contrast between candid footage and designed end cards
